reviews.comment:
Pocas veces vi tanta velocidad y eficiencia en el servicio. Se nota que la gente trabaja con la atención al cliente como prioridad. Las instalaciones estaban impecables, sobre todo los baños. Definitivamente volveré.

(Translated by Google)
I've rarely seen such speed and efficiency in service. It's clear that the staff prioritizes customer service. The facilities were spotless, especially the restrooms. I'll definitely be back.

Excellent service from everyone, a 100% recommendation. Aside from filling up your tank, you're filled with joy from everyone's good vibes. I'd also like to highlight that the coffee is the most delicious thing you'll ever taste.
